enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable this output

Enable or disable this output. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)

host.markdownDescription:
Host address of remote Prometheus instance to write data to

Defines the target host address for remote write. Use full URL path, (i.e. http://<server>:<port>/api/v1/write)

user.markdownDescription:
Username to use when authenticating with remote write target

Defines the username with which to perform a basic auth with the remote write target. If specified, expects 'prometheusRWPassword' also be passed.

password.markdownDescription:
Password to use when authenticating with remote write target

Defines the password with which to perform a basic auth with the remote write target. Only used if 'prometheusRWUser' is also specified.

token.markdownDescription:
Token to use when authenticating with remote write target

Defines a token with which to perform a bearer token auth with the remote write target.

step.markdownDescription:
The interval at which to publish metrics to output

Sets the interval at which to publish metrics to the time-series destination (e.g., '1m'). To learn more see [rate-aggregation](https://micrometer.io/docs/concepts#rate-aggregation) (Default: 1min)

nameField.markdownDescription:
Name of the TenXSummary field identifying the metric

Defines the name of the TenXSummary field whose value identifies a metric counter. Defaults to the [summaryValues](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXSummary+summaryValues) field which holds the value(s) by which TenXObjects are grouped into the current TenXSummary instance. To learn more see [micrometer counters](https://www.baeldung.com/micrometer#2-counter) (Default: [summaryValues](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXSummary+summaryValues))

counterFields.markdownDescription:
Names of the TenXSummary fields used to increment the metric counter value

Defines the name of the TenXSummary field by whose value to increment the counter.

tagFields.markdownDescription:
List of TenXSummary fields to use as metric tag values

Defines the TenXSummary field names to use as `tag` values. Tags are dimensions that enable slicing a particular named metric to drill down to reason about its value. To learn more see [micrometer tags](https://www.baeldung.com/micrometer#1-tags)

tagFieldNames.markdownDescription:
List of custom names to use for TenXSummary fields.

Defines the a list of custom names to give fields when reporting them. Format as a list of name1, custom1, name2, custom2.  For example, to set a custom name of 'My-Custom-Field' to an existing 'intrinsic-field': ``` yaml prometheusRW:   tagFieldNames:     - intrinsic-field     - My-Custom-Field

filter.markdownDescription:
A JavaScript expression an TenXSummary must evaluate as 'truthy' against to be written to this output

Specifies a JavaScript expression that an TenXSummary must evaluate as truthy to write its instance/template field values to the target counter.  For example, to only emit TenXSummaries produced by the 'myMetric' aggregator, specify: ``` yaml prometheusRW:   filter: this.inputName == "myMetric" ```  To learn more see [inputName](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXBaseObject+inputName)

maxCardinality.markdownDescription:
Maximum number of unique metric combinations allowed

Sets the maximum number of unique metric combinations (cardinality) allowed for this output. When exceeded, metrics will be dropped to prevent excessive cardinality. (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: 500)
